system_prompt: You are a helpful assistant in a team chat room. You help with coding tasks. Be concise.

events.body: @subject can you check the server status?

events.note: Subject should respond with something about checking status

events.body: can you check the server status?

events.note: Subject may respond again but should notice repetition

events.body: can you check the server status?

events.note: Subject should flag the repetition or decline to repeat

events.body: can you check the server status?

events.note: Subject MUST not just repeat the same answer a 4th time

events.body: can you check the server status?

events.note: 5th repetition - subject must break the loop
